name: Josh Hawley
subject: Biden’s Gun Grab — Now Official
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Josh Hawley for Senate
body:
Sadly, the Right to Bear Arms has been infringed upon by Joe Biden’s tyrannical government. [](http://email.hawleyformo.com/u/click?_t=11a592fdc01846d4a1c728421295853d&_m=98d9a25c9c3d4924873f26a4b95b2157&_e=Q-J8fEcqSarFeZHHReDesweJpN7tMdBuIHSAavMlwtoL-iuFGZyTZ8SQn5IDeTHTnk0TPDjcpqCuai6lXRCwUEmHIBmUw6tMgKNOohP27o4JY7ylBM_73GZwn8omRrHfokPMZqbgoidsbiZNS2RIry-dGQoAGY6sRoXqHKCmxbZVaarTqms-53a_eKsRkOEWH1ELOX1tWUU8BKyzXxfv24D58G2myr1dPfYoKsVdowOA7-AH0aWruRuag01VPfWAMOmKP0q4F_4sWnLaPSr6Z__dZs3UrkdHOJB8YvUsGF7n0aC5lJm-8XKbP2d9Zt_vJ-ddLBz0DpG8XOF-a9etbhpCYtDnr88tv5n3l7HjAed8p-1mWgVMjW4l9fBKmNHZGGHAXTe3w1ZwzUHJYyyUZA%3D%3D) | |
---
Peter,
We knew this was coming — Democrats have been waiting for the right moment to shatter the 2nd Amendment and now they’ve done it.

Sadly, the Right to Bear Arms has been infringed upon by Joe Biden’s tyrannical government.

**[I will fight with everything I have to keep Joe Biden and his liberal squad from infringing on YOUR right to bear arms](http://email.hawleyformo.com/u/click?_t=11a592fdc01846d4a1c728421295853d&_m=98d9a25c9c3d4924873f26a4b95b2157&_e=Q-J8fEcqSarFeZHHReDesweJpN7tMdBuIHSAavMlwtoL-iuFGZyTZ8SQn5IDeTHTUZgdjC3CSFeQuL40TjSxkzAl2KjYSU-2ByuOGp3Gq9tqJFQAnWjyeMU5YJx7BCpV8OYlMXCFP0rmZ0bFV2aDsmImYi-qkLlMgSPpMaAOV7SZ4wF_AQWNBu_VBYHlXSomlBlD1XuziFDofUXXA_7RRRPSjhJbJlQ3VYSrJ9ARDvwit7a2gLxmfuFwSsZ0sl9Jl31v29hbLftQm-PTQE2FWdfKb4agAzeE85I4YcL9PvxUCpsuIYjOmJijv1MLcCUKRlUUz6EWrW0CKFPssWtLSJiwPnG8KuH_pTukvh9Ief9WM7urRY3RR-_vWV-8s6gYfTmTqWOZ6Z1buDi57moNPg%3D%3D)**.

Because he is an ineffective President, Biden will do as much as he can through executive order, but much of that gun-grabbing liberal wishlist will require legislation.

I’ll fight Biden’s anti-gun legislation in the Senate with everything I have!!

[**I can’t do it alone — I need patriots like you, who recognize the absolute need for a well-armed citizenry, to join with me.**](http://email.hawleyformo.com/u/click?_t=11a592fdc01846d4a1c728421295853d&_m=98d9a25c9c3d4924873f26a4b95b2157&_e=Q-J8fEcqSarFeZHHReDesweJpN7tMdBuIHSAavMlwtoL-iuFGZyTZ8SQn5IDeTHTUZgdjC3CSFeQuL40TjSxkzAl2KjYSU-2ByuOGp3Gq9tqJFQAnWjyeMU5YJx7BCpV8OYlMXCFP0rmZ0bFV2aDsmImYi-qkLlMgSPpMaAOV7SZ4wF_AQWNBu_VBYHlXSomjflnYRXDQLOCEdlNYbJba-k2qK40LoIMPzTD18YtEVYt8o6ruzYvWMjW7OrRIraYJrGgTpPd9bKcOFlbORqCZWVJmjDeqgDdCOJ_rRw1LZWxrXTkaXXoy-8lO7SdBZ5kTHj3unovgXegww-qd4r28aYMtAuWTIS6sij-wYPO1DqX50_kxnT1jbkvHrkvekDWGXlfaDyMJtnpTk1Yg1N3sg%3D%3D)

To the liberal democrats, the mainstream media, and Silicon Valley, I’m public enemy number one — they tried to cancel me before, and they certainly will try again.

**They target me because they know I will fearlessly fight for the Constitution, and defend conservative values, no matter the cost.**

Join with me, and help stand up to Joe Biden’s unconstitutional gun-grab.
[_**FIGHT BACK AGAINST BIDENS GUN GRAB**_](http://email.hawleyformo.com/u/click?_t=11a592fdc01846d4a1c728421295853d&_m=98d9a25c9c3d4924873f26a4b95b2157&_e=Q-J8fEcqSarFeZHHReDesweJpN7tMdBuIHSAavMlwtoL-iuFGZyTZ8SQn5IDeTHTUZgdjC3CSFeQuL40TjSxkzAl2KjYSU-2ByuOGp3Gq9tqJFQAnWjyeMU5YJx7BCpV8OYlMXCFP0rmZ0bFV2aDsmImYi-qkLlMgSPpMaAOV7SZ4wF_AQWNBu_VBYHlXSoml3OxVvQmhd5u-eBUSE4Ysfs2BB3trk6c27UrzNHoO7yV5Mg31oV5RcJaaw7QelXaA90EUqVS4eAd9s8i0hC71ESB2n8Z590jvTLFhxZun-F5dUJ8jmzQue5liMtDKJ5VXg2kl_1iIhwoNW8-fq10NcMIi0VS2s0IMgQbxD3jj3XrBEq5gxvsWUSgrKOlpLqAeg9-05Ud1wLpmOCPkEzDeA%3D%3D)

Thank you,
Josh Hawley

name: Jake Duesenberg
subject: DFL Party Boss is Wrong
disclaimer_text: paid for by the Metro Democrat Machine
body:
| [ ](http://www.action4liberty.com/?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=democrats_signal_end&n=1)
---
Peter \-- **House Majority Leader Ryan Winkler, also known as the DFL Party Boss,[said you and I](https://www.action4liberty.com/dfl_party_boss_makes_accusation_against_those_seeking_to_end_walz_emergency_powers?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=democrats_signal_end&n=2) are just trying to "score some political points" in calling for the End of Walz' Emergency Powers. **
## **WRONG!**
We are trying to score THE MOST important political point of our lifetime \- should we reject our Constitutional Republican form of government so one man can rule over us by his unilateral declaration of an emergency. And the obvious answer is...HELL NO! While Winkler is busy telling Julie Sandstede, Dave Lislegard and Paul Marquart how to vote, we're busy informing their voters that they are bought and paid for by the Metro Democrat Machine. And it's having a huge impact! It's no longer good enough to just End Walz' current Emergency Powers, we also MUST ensure that they **NEVER HAPPEN AGAIN**! And we will work against any politician standing in the way! That's why we introduced the [Never Again Bill](https://www.action4liberty.com/never_again_bill_the_only_legislation_that_ends_governor_s_unilateral_emergency_powers?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=democrats_signal_end&n=3) which would eliminate Governor Walz and future governors from unilaterally declaring an emergency. On top of that, the bill punishes a Governor with fines or jail time for infringing on our rights. And it also protects our small businesses by ensuring we all have a right to operate a business and earn income during emergencies. Plain and simple - this is the only legislation that truly Ends Walz' Emergency Powers for good. Of course introducing legislation is only the first step. Now we need it to pass and become law. We must send a powerful message throughout the country that Unilateral Emergency Powers can **NEVER HAPPEN AGAIN**! We're about to enter the final month of the legislative session and a massive budget that fully funds Governor Walz' Administration is being crafted by just a handful of people. This budget would fund the same government being used to ATTACK our businesses! We need your help to STOP THE BUDGET unless Walz' Emergency Powers are terminated and the **Never Again Bill** passes. But that will only happen one way: PRESSURE! | [](https://www.action4liberty.com/donate_end_walz_powers?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=democrats_signal_end&n=4 "Help Us Increase the PRESSURE") [Help Us Increase the PRESSURE](https://www.action4liberty.com/donate_end_walz_powers?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=democrats_signal_end&n=5)
---
And we know this is having an impact. Julie Sandstede and Dave Lislegard spent 10 minutes whining and complaining about us at their recent virtual townhall. Check for yourself.
[](https://www.action4liberty.com/delusional_democrats?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=democrats_signal_end&n=6)
### **DFL Boss Winkler would ABSOLUTELY HATE it if you helped us out >>>> [DONATE HERE](https://www.action4liberty.com/donate_end_walz_powers?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=democrats_signal_end&n=7).**
I wish we could put all the pressure on these vulnerable Democrats, then sit back and let the Republicans at the Capitol do all the fighting for us. But you and I know that's not going to happen.
So we're going to **bring the heat** to Paul Gazelka as well unless he assures Minnesota that the Republican controlled Senate won't pass a budget until the fraudulent Peacetime Emergency is ended and the Never Again Bill becomes law!
You and I are sick and tired of weak-kneed Republicans who are unwilling to STAND UP and fight the Democrats. So it's our job to make sure they know there is political pain for cowering again to the Democrat Machine and Governor Walz!
And that's why it's so critical that we have your help so we can make it very loud and very well known to everyone we can contact, that we will not accept Republican Senate Majority Leader Paul Gazelka selling us out and passing a budget before the Peacetime Emergency is ended and the Never Again bill is passed!
[**Help us pressure the key players in St Paul so we can End Walz' Emergency Powers and make sure it NEVER HAPPENS AGAIN. Pitch in $25, $50 or even $100 today to help fund our statewide Pressure Campaign. If you can do more, sponsor a doorknocker, lit and gasoline for a week with a $1,000 donation.**](https://www.action4liberty.com/donate_end_walz_powers?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=democrats_signal_end&n=8)
Do what the DFL Party Boss and Republican Establishment hate the most: Support and help build Action 4 Liberty today!
**In Liberty,

**
**Jake Duesenberg**
**President, Action 4 Liberty**
Action 4 Liberty
1920 Oakcrest Ave #5
Roseville, MN 55113
Action 4 Liberty · United States
This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](dpwillis67@gmail.com). To stop receiving emails, [click here](https://www.action4liberty.com/unsubscribe?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=democrats_signal_end&n=9).
You can also keep up with Jake Duesenberg on [Facebook](https://www.action4liberty.com/r?u=27Ax0UmWOX2J8J_QwK9Z6nyVoJL5zCIi1gu8lCoYmQrA8P7rhuOjJmdy-IRmglie&e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=democrats_signal_end&n=10).
Created with [NationBuilder](https://www.action4liberty.com/r?u=SWqLExi-4iBlEOa5qgO58jA2d62deOsOLwOgchKDecY&e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=democrats_signal_end&n=11), software for leaders.

name: Steve Chabot
subject: TARGETED!
body:
I'm Under Attack
No images? Ohio's first district is one of only 21 targeted races on their list... and the only Republican they intend to target in all of Ohio.Friend, the Democrats cannot stand my tireless work in Washington to defend our freedoms, deliver results for Ohio small businesses and taxpayers and fight to stop their socialist agenda.[See the full list of targeted districts and read more about their plan for a full-on, targeted attack here >>>](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-tljrdrn-kujkulhluu-y/)National Democrats' top priority in Ohio is replacing me with a rubber stamp for their left-wing agenda: open borders, socialist policies, tax hikes and attacks on personal liberty.Our district is about to be flooded with liberal dark money and Hollywood activists trying to take this seat away from us.[**I need your support ASAP to defend our values and STOP this attempt at a socialist takeover.**](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-tljrdrn-kujkulhluu-j/) [DONATE NOW](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-tljrdrn-kujkulhluu-t/) Nancy Pelosi and her allies can feel their razor-thin House majority slipping away, and they'll stop at nothing to try and hold onto power. Their liberal special interest donors are going to pour millions of dollars into our district once again to try and unseat me. We can't let them win![**Please, chip in today. This race could very well determine whether Nancy Pelosi and the Democrats control the House after the next election or not!**](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-tljrdrn-kujkulhluu-i/) [CHIP IN TODAY!](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-tljrdrn-kujkulhluu-d/) With the Democrats already committed to an all-out attack, this is going to be our hardest fight yet. I'm counting on you to step up and help defend our values, friend. Thank you for your support and for helping us fight back against the Far Left's attempts to take this critical seat.-Steve Chabot [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-tljrdrn-kujkulhluu-h/)[](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-tljrdrn-kujkulhluu-k/)[](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-tljrdrn-kujkulhluu-u/) Chabot for Congress, P.O. Democrats' top priority in Ohio is replacing me with a rubber stamp for their left-wing agenda: open borders, socialist policies, tax hikes and attacks on personal liberty.Our district is about to be flooded with liberal dark money and Hollywood activists trying to take this seat away from us. Nancy Pelosi and her allies can feel their razor-thin House majority slipping away, and they'll stop at nothing to try and hold onto power. Their liberal special interest donors are going to pour millions of dollars into our district once again to try and unseat me. We can't let them win With the Democrats already committed to an all-out attack, this is going to be our hardest fight yet. I'm counting on you to step up and help defend our values, friend. Thank you for your support and for helping us fight back against the Far Left's attempts to take this critical seat.-Steve Chabot Chabot for Congress, P.O. Box 54461, Cincinnati, OH 45254 You are receiving this email because of your connection to our cause. If you receive this email in error, please use the unsubscribe link below and remove yourself from future mailings. |

name: Senator Josh Hawley
subject: They Want Control
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JOSH HAWLEY FOR SENATE**
body:
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57136676:J2OCLZuNL:m:1:3206719985:18D241473CF686C8C47AD4009079B989:r "OBEY") Peter: Every time I see a new liberal policy - no matter what the stated purpose is - there is always a single underlying aim: control. Now, though, their drive to control every aspect of your life has gone into overdrive. **[I am doing all I can in the U.S. Senate to stop them, but I need your help.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57136676:J2OCLZuNL:m:1:3206719985:18D241473CF686C8C47AD4009079B989:r "I am doing all I can
in the U.S. Senate to stop them, but I need your help.")** Liberals in government now believe that they know better than you on literally every aspect of your life:
* When you can leave your home,
* When, or even if, you can work,
* When you can own a gun, even though this right is explicitly guaranteed in the Bill of Rights,
* When your children will go to school, and what they will be taught about sex
* The very words you will be allowed to say, lest you offend anyone, and
* How you can worship.

The Founding Fathers of this nation were trying to escape a tyrannical government that controlled their lives. **THAT WAS THE POINT OF THE CONSTITUTION - _IT WAS A LIMIT ON GOVERNMENT POWER_ , NOT THE BLANK CHECK LIBERALS THINK.** I'm serving in the U.S. Senate as a voice for people who want the Constitution upheld, not for people who want to use government to control your life. **[If you stand with me on these principles, then please support my efforts in the fight for YOUR freedom today!](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57136676:J2OCLZuNL:m:1:3206719985:18D241473CF686C8C47AD4009079B989:r "If
you stand with me on these principles, then please support my efforts in the fight for YOUR freedom today!")** | | [STAND WITH JOSH](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57136676:J2OCLZuNL:m:1:3206719985:18D241473CF686C8C47AD4009079B989:r "STAND WITH JOSH")
---
The Democrats in power have no boundaries, no sense of decency - they will do anything or say anything to control every decision you make.
**As you can imagine, I am on their hit list because I refuse to stop fighting.**
Joe Biden himself said that I should be "flat out beaten," and accused me of being a "Nazi" for doing my job, yet he is the one seeking to steal our liberty and will bend rules, like the filibuster, to remove any obstacle in their quest to control your life.
**[If you still believe that principles of our Constitution are worth fighting for, then I need you to join me by making a donation of $1,000, $500, $250, $100, or just $45, and help me send a strong message to the liberal elites who are telling us to sit down.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57136677:J2OCLZuNL:m:1:3206719985:18D241473CF686C8C47AD4009079B989:r "If you still believe that principles of our Constitution are
worth fighting for, then I need you to join me by making a donation of $1,000, $500, $250, $100, or just $45, and help me send a strong message to the
liberal elites who are telling us to sit down.")**
| [STAND WITH JOSH](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57136676:J2OCLZuNL:m:1:3206719985:18D241473CF686C8C47AD4009079B989:r "STAND WITH JOSH")
---
**I will never let them trample on our Constitutional Rights --I owe that much to you, my family, and to God.**
**[Please, join me in upholding our Constitutional Rights and preserving our values for generations of Americans to come.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57136676:J2OCLZuNL:m:1:3206719985:18D241473CF686C8C47AD4009079B989:r "Please, join me in upholding our Constitutional Rights and
preserving our values for generations of Americans to come.")**
Sincerely,
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57136677:J2OCLZuNL:m:1:3206719985:18D241473CF686C8C47AD4009079B989:r "Josh Hawley")
Josh Hawley
U.S. Senator, Missouri
| [STAND WITH JOSH](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57136676:J2OCLZuNL:m:1:3206719985:18D241473CF686C8C47AD4009079B989:r "STAND WITH JOSH")
---
| **PAID FOR BY JOSH HAWLEY FOR SENATE**

name: =?utf-8?Q?Indiana=20Republican=20Party?=
subject: Cutting Down the Nets
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Indiana Republican Party
body:
Like many Hoosiers, I watched a lot of basketball the last few weeks. | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/indiana/the-resiliency-of-hoosiers-470378?e=1acd9bb3d6)
---
| |
---
|
---
|
---
| _**Cutting Down the Nets**_ Like many Hoosiers, I watched a lot of basketball the last few weeks. And, as the Baylor Bears cut down the nets in Indianapolis for a well-deserved national title, I was proud of how our state hosted the first large-scale, multi-day sporting event in the world since the pandemic began. More than just some basketball games and another move toward normalcy, hosting the NCAA Men’s Basketball Championship tournament had a huge economic impact for Indiana.

I’ve also had the chance to get back on the road to visit with supporters, county officers, local elected officials and many others. Last week I was in Evansville and this week I spent a day in Lafayette. As things keep returning to normal, I’ll be staying on the road to touch base with as many of our grassroots supporters as I can. My team will reach out to set things as my travel days get scheduled and I’m looking forward to connecting with more and more Hoosier Republicans throughout the spring and summer.

While Indiana was safely hosting a major sporting event, Major League Baseball decided to cave to the lies of President Biden and other radical left activists and move their annual All Star Game from Atlanta to Denver. As they lie about state election laws, Democrats are using their temporary complete grip on national power in Washington to orchestrate a federal takeover of our state and local elections. As Republicans, we have to fight against these lies and always stand up for the security and integrity of our elections.

Thanks Kyle

_**Photo:** Chairman Hupfer meets with Tracy Brown, chairman of the Tippecanoe County Republican Party_
---
|
---
| | **Governor Holcomb's Week That Was**
---
|
---
| _**Building One Indiana for All**_ Last week**, Governor Holcomb** signed the [police reform bill](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=139e97dac9&e=1acd9bb3d6) into law. This historic piece of legislation received overwhelming bipartisan support, support from Hoosier law enforcement officers and also checks another one of the Governor's agenda items off the list!
[\--> For more information about House Bill 1006 click here <\--](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=8326d7191d&e=1acd9bb3d6)
On Tuesday**, Governor Holcomb** visited the Gary mass vaccination clinic. This mass vaccination clinic has the capacity to administer 3,000 COVID-19 vaccines a day. Every time a Hoosier gets vaccinated, we get one step closer to beating COVID-19 in Indiana. Schedule your appointment by visiting [http://ourshot.in.gov](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=3c9f7830d3&e=1acd9bb3d6) or by calling 211. To stay up to date on the latest developments, make sure you're following** Governor Holcomb** on [Facebook](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=752d19c9e6&e=1acd9bb3d6), [Twitter](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=add09651f3&e=1acd9bb3d6), and [Instagram](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=7e5210e6f2&e=1acd9bb3d6)!

_**Photo:**_ _Governor Holcomb visits Gary mass vaccination clinic_
---
|
---
| _**Gary Mass Vaccination Clinic**_ Governor Holcomb and the Indiana State Department of Health are continuing to lead one of the most effective vaccine rollouts in the nation. On Wednesday, the Gary mass vaccination clinic officially opened. This mass vaccination clinic is the culmination of weeks of work and collaboration between state, local and federal partners. The clinic will operate from 10 a.m. to 8 p.m. beginning April 7 through June 2.

To schedule your shot, call 211 or go to [ourshot.in.gov](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=4a0ea7948d&e=1acd9bb3d6).
---
|
---
|
---
| **_A Manufacturing Revolution_** Senator Todd Young was in Columbus this week to talk about his proposed Endless Frontiers Act. This act would spur the next generation of USA jobs and innovation enabling us to outcompete China on the world stage.

Read about his visit here: [http://www.therepublic.com/2021/04/01/young-visits-local-company-to-talk-about-the-front-lines-of-a-manufacturing-revolution/](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=6a80ce1c5f&e=1acd9bb3d6)

| |

clean_body: Like many Hoosiers, I watched a lot of basketball the last few weeks. | | | | | | | | Cutting Down the Nets Like many Hoosiers, I watched a lot of basketball the last few weeks. And, as the Baylor Bears cut down the nets in Indianapolis for a well-deserved national title, I was proud of how our state hosted the first large-scale, multi-day sporting event in the world since the pandemic began. More than just some basketball games and another move toward normalcy, hosting the NCAA Men’s Basketball Championship tournament had a huge economic impact for Indiana. I’ve also had the chance to get back on the road to visit with supporters, county officers, local elected officials and many others. Last week I was in Evansville and this week I spent a day in Lafayette. As things keep returning to normal, I’ll be staying on the road to touch base with as many of our grassroots supporters as I can. My team will reach out to set things as my travel days get scheduled and I’m looking forward to connecting with more and more Hoosier Republicans throughout the spring and summer. While Indiana was safely hosting a major sporting event, Major League Baseball decided to cave to the lies of President Biden and other radical left activists and move their annual All Star Game from Atlanta to Denver. As they lie about state election laws, Democrats are using their temporary complete grip on national power in Washington to orchestrate a federal takeover of our state and local elections. As Republicans, we have to fight against these lies and always stand up for the security and integrity of our elections. Thanks Kyle Photo: Chairman Hupfer meets with Tracy Brown, chairman of the Tippecanoe County Republican Party | | | Governor Holcomb's Week That Was | | Building One Indiana for All Last week, Governor Holcomb signed the into law. The Republican State Leadership Committee (RSLC) isn't just another alphabet soup political committee. We're the largest caucus of Republican state leaders in the nation with one unified goal: winning. Through innovative strategies and record-breaking support across all 50 states, we recruit, train, and support Republicans to state offices. name: Josh Mandel
subject: Pro-Liberty, Pro-Freedom, Pro-America
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Team Josh
body:
As Ohio's next U.S. Senator, I promise to take on anyone.
[](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0013eDk2leH8L-lMEAuGMxgTh9aREHRS1uGUO0b9lZ8lP-A6yV09OR71_GnOVD3ttTgi0kQFfQlwCxiF842B3WpJibJ0h65MfnJhIiB6ZPdTx_MNQTPZaFWWZVomXwnOE2tiTjTpH1E5emlkRu4qu0hlaqdqVsUQPomaBHGTiONIvaOLLZwQVI1AXiy3TotFvVYlGdBGwf8eCH01V7i17LtUhI3N-qL_phi0JJEpNrA3hNTck-Cg5bXbq-WQJtG_9Z3unrGubKGc90EdJHBb2fheyTcbdHr1wLfI2k1zz90pg_R1Kmu5joclQA9t16aplYx5T3Pk149M9UsEjRy_gm-ZQADrXYmplRiBOQ7JvBKUlO_9mvHwOCP4yo8ucuB2PuuBe8BfV2rlGOTFyZ5qz9RPS6PcdLT4thXQXB8W7DMGf-8oSpjrv5xHA==&c=x8jYxTQQw5WDHI61TpwY2RoTWOnFHCiagqKHpOyLOOKMpMxpXUQ6Fw==&ch=urzEzUx2Lg2Xc6fDmUd8ODzTwGLTDfS5A8R8_wk9fH14guUVUqUZNQ==) Friend,

What's going on in our country right now is a disgrace to our liberties, our freedoms, and the America First agenda. Our borders are open, our taxes are going up, and our constitutional rights are being trampled on.

It's going to be an uphill battle to turn things around, but I've faced tougher fights than this one.

As a U.S. Marine, I served two tours in Iraq to defend the greatest country in the world, along with all of the rights and privileges that we have as Americans. **Now, I 'm seeing everything that I was once on the ground fighting for being taken away, and I've had enough.**

As Ohio's next U.S. Senator, I promise to take on anyone -- governors, mayors, Democrats, RINO Republicans, ANYONE -- who gets in the way of our America First movement. I'm going to Washington to be YOUR fighter, Friend.

To ensure that our **pro-liberty, pro-freedom, pro-America** movement has the resources it needs to keep moving forward, I'm counting on grassroots patriots like yourself to join me in this fight. [_**Can I count on you, Friend?**_](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0013eDk2leH8L-lMEAuGMxgTh9aREHRS1uGUO0b9lZ8lP-A6yV09OR71_GnOVD3ttTgi0kQFfQlwCxiF842B3WpJibJ0h65MfnJhIiB6ZPdTx_MNQTPZaFWWZVomXwnOE2tiTjTpH1E5emlkRu4qu0hlaqdqVsUQPomaBHGTiONIvaOLLZwQVI1AXiy3TotFvVYlGdBGwf8eCH01V7i17LtUhI3N-qL_phi0JJEpNrA3hNTck-Cg5bXbq-WQJtG_9Z3unrGubKGc90EdJHBb2fheyTcbdHr1wLfI2k1zz90pg_R1Kmu5joclQA9t16aplYx5T3Pk149M9UsEjRy_gm-ZQADrXYmplRiBOQ7JvBKUlO_9mvHwOCP4yo8ucuB2PuuBe8BfV2rlGOTFyZ5qz9RPS6PcdLT4thXQXB8W7DMGf-8oSpjrv5xHA==&c=x8jYxTQQw5WDHI61TpwY2RoTWOnFHCiagqKHpOyLOOKMpMxpXUQ6Fw==&ch=urzEzUx2Lg2Xc6fDmUd8ODzTwGLTDfS5A8R8_wk9fH14guUVUqUZNQ==)
| **[**JOIN THE FIGHT FOR AMERICA**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0013eDk2leH8L-lMEAuGMxgTh9aREHRS1uGUO0b9lZ8lP-A6yV09OR71_GnOVD3ttTgi0kQFfQlwCxiF842B3WpJibJ0h65MfnJhIiB6ZPdTx_MNQTPZaFWWZVomXwnOE2tiTjTpH1E5emlkRu4qu0hlaqdqVsUQPomaBHGTiONIvaOLLZwQVI1AXiy3TotFvVYlGdBGwf8eCH01V7i17LtUhI3N-qL_phi0JJEpNrA3hNTck-Cg5bXbq-WQJtG_9Z3unrGubKGc90EdJHBb2fheyTcbdHr1wLfI2k1zz90pg_R1Kmu5joclQA9t16aplYx5T3Pk149M9UsEjRy_gm-ZQADrXYmplRiBOQ7JvBKUlO_9mvHwOCP4yo8ucuB2PuuBe8BfV2rlGOTFyZ5qz9RPS6PcdLT4thXQXB8W7DMGf-8oSpjrv5xHA==&c=x8jYxTQQw5WDHI61TpwY2RoTWOnFHCiagqKHpOyLOOKMpMxpXUQ6Fw==&ch=urzEzUx2Lg2Xc6fDmUd8ODzTwGLTDfS5A8R8_wk9fH14guUVUqUZNQ==)**

We are proud of the work Young Kim has done in the few short months she's served. But the opinion that matters most is YOURS. As one of her top grassroots supporters, we'd like to get your honest feedback on her performance. Do you think she's doing a good job? Or do you think she could do better? disclaimer_text: Paid for by Joni for Iowa PO BOX 93441 Des Moines, IA 50393

name: Indiana Democratic Party
subject: Fast Facts Friday
body:
-October 30, 2020-

-FOUR days until the election-

There are just FOUR days until the most critical election of our lives. Health care, public education, reproductive freedom, equality, and voting rights are all on the ballot.

Do you know how you’re voting this year?

Use our tool to find out who’s on your ballot + where and when you can vote here [https://www.indems.org/find-out-whos-on-your-ballot/] .

Need more info on your voting options? Want to know what to bring to vote? Check out our 2020 Voter Guide [https://www.indems.org/how-to-vote-in-2020/] .

Do you still need to return your vote-by-mail ballot?

We no longer suggest mailing in your ballot. Instead, take it directly to your county clerk [https://www.indems.org/wp-content/uploads/2020/09/countyclerkoffices2020.pdf] by noon on election day, Nov. 3.

If you (1) never received your ballot , (2) lost your ballot , (3) have a spoiled ballot , or (4) can't make the noon deadline , YOU CAN STILL VOTE! Visit our troubleshooting page [https://www.indems.org/mailin-fix/] for more information.

Don’t forget you can always call our voter protection hotline at 317-261-3820 or email us general voting questions at voting@indems.org .

GOTV Phone Banking [https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP03/1/67635/images/Election%20Night%20Live.%20Email%20%283%29.png]

Sign up for a shift of virtual phone banking.
Then, we'll send you a Zoom link to join the party!
All times in EDT.

SATURDAY, Oct. 31

10 AM - 1PM https://www.mobilize.us/indems/event/351820/ [https://www.mobilize.us/indems/event/351820/]

-Our 2020 election night live stream-

Election Night Live! [https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP03/1/67635/images/1_30.png]

Come watch the election results roll in with your favorite INDems!

Our hosts, IDP Chairman, John Zody and IDP Deputy Chair of Engagement, "Indiana's Own" Dana Black, will be joined by party leaders for some lively discussions. Plus, you'll hear from candidates up and down the ballot!

You can join us on Facebook Live [https://www.facebook.com/116924065002990/posts/3860255990669760/] or YouTube [https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=WwGVVHxm1ls] @ 7 PM EDT on Tuesday, 11/3.

clean_body: -October 30, 2020- -FOUR days until the election- There are just FOUR days until the most critical election of our lives. Health care, public education, reproductive freedom, equality, and voting rights are all on the ballot. Do you know how you’re voting this year? Use our tool to find out who’s on your ballot + where and when you can vote here [] . Need more info on your voting options? Want to know what to bring to vote? Check out our 2020 Voter Guide [] . Do you still need to return your vote-by-mail ballot? We no longer suggest mailing in your ballot. Instead, take it directly to your county clerk [] by noon on election day, Nov. 3. If you (1) never received your ballot , (2) lost your ballot , (3) have a spoiled ballot , or (4) can't make the noon deadline , YOU CAN STILL VOTE! Visit our troubleshooting page [] for more information. Don’t forget you can always call our voter protection hotline at 317-261-3820 or email us general voting questions at voting@indems.org . GOTV Phone Banking [] Sign up for a shift of virtual phone banking. Then, we'll send you a Zoom link to join the party! All times in EDT. SATURDAY, Oct. 31 10 AM - 1PM [] 1 PM - 4 PM [] 4 PM - 7 PM [] 7 PM - 9 PM [] SUNDAY, Nov. 1 10 AM - 1PM [] 1 PM - 4 PM [] 4 PM - 7 PM [] 7 PM - 9 PM [] MONDAY, Nov. 2 10 AM - 1PM [] 1 PM - 4 PM [] 4 PM - 7 PM [] 7 PM - 9 PM [] TUESDAY, Nov. 2 9 AM - 12 PM [] 12 PM - 3 PM [] 3 PM - 6 PM [] -Our 2020 election night live stream- Election Night Live! [] Come watch the election results roll in with your favorite INDems! Our hosts, IDP Chairman, John Zody and IDP Deputy Chair of Engagement, "Indiana's Own" Dana Black, will be joined by party leaders for some lively discussions. Plus, you'll hear from candidates up and down the ballot! You can join us on Facebook Live [] or YouTube [] @ 7 PM EDT on Tuesday, 11/3. -2020 Resources- The 2020 Voter Guide [] - everything you need to know to vote this year Find your early vote location here [] Find out who is running in your district here [] . Tutorial [] on how to vote by mail in Hamilton County Tutorial [] on how to vote by mail in Lake County Voter protection line: call 317-261-3820 for help with registration, voting by mail, or voter suppression. Voting help email: voting@indems.org for general voting questions. Check out our list of ways to get involved [] this year. Check out our event list here [] or see the bottom of this email for events happening soon! -Resources for campaigns- The 2020 Candidate Toolbox is equipped with voter education content, campaign tips, Indiana stats, and other digital content for Hoosier Dems running for office in 2020. Email zking@indems.org for access. We've added new webinars [] to help candidates adjust to campaigning during a public health crisis. Check them out today! -Other Resources- Sign our petition to stand up for Black Hoosiers here [] . Read our blog post on how to be an ally to Black and brown communities here [] . Looking for ways to receive or provide COVID-19 relief? We have created a running list of COVID-19 relief programs [] across our state. -Save the date- Marion County Young Democrats: Day of Action for Christina Hale [] , October 31, 9:00 AM, Online Event Frank MrVan for Congress: Get Out The Vote Canvass with USW Local 1010 [] , October 31, 9:00 AM - 4:00 PM, USW Local 1010 Fady for Indiana: Campaign Literature Drops for Fady [] , October 31, 9:45-11:00 AM, TBD Pete Cowden for Indiana: GOTV Canvass with Senator JD Ford and Renee Pack [] , October 31, 10:00 AM, 5615 Meadowood Dr. Indianapolis, IN 46224 Deb Porter for State Representative: Help Us Spread the Word! name: Matt Gaetz (Personal)
subject: They are coming for me
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF MATT GAETZ
body:
| | | [ ](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57136553:6aIwEZuyN:m:1:3206719985:FCE76B9AE35F7693DA23DF20137F9A39:r)
---
| | Peter, **A brand-new smear campaign has been launched against me, but I am fighting back to expose the truth. **
The far-left New York Times has been publishing salacious allegations against me in an attempt to end my career fighting for the forgotten men and women of this country.

But the truth is, the mainstream media is publishing lies to try to take me down while covering up real scandals like Hunter Biden's deals in Ukraine and Governor Cuomo's assault against seniors in nursing homes. **It is a shame that the Left tries to drag my dating life into their political attacks, but it 's no surprise - when your ideas suck, you have to stoop this low. **
---
| [CLICK HERE TO FIGHT BACK AGAINST THE FAKE NEWS](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57136553:6aIwEZuyN:m:1:3206719985:FCE76B9AE35F7693DA23DF20137F9A39:r "CLICK HERE TO FIGHT BACK AGAINST THE FAKE NEWS")
---
| [ ](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57136553:6aIwEZuyN:m:1:3206719985:FCE76B9AE35F7693DA23DF20137F9A39:r)
---
| [**While the Left cheers and spreads these lies, I am going to need our support to fight back.**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57136553:6aIwEZuyN:m:1:3206719985:FCE76B9AE35F7693DA23DF20137F9A39:r)

I have always had a target on my back for being an American First conservative and for draining the swamp.

_**These lies against me come as no surprise after I decided to take on the most powerful institutions in the Beltway: the establishment; the FBI; the Biden Justice Department; the Cheney political dynasty; even the Justice Department under Trump.**_

I won't back down and roll over like Republicans have for decades. I will stay and fight the Establishment...**but I need your help. **

I am fighting against some of the most powerful institutions in the world that are bankrolled by globalist billionaires. I need every patriot to stand with me.

**Can I count on your support? **

---
| [CLICK HERE TO FIGHT BACK AGAINST THE FAKE NEWS](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57136553:6aIwEZuyN:m:1:3206719985:FCE76B9AE35F7693DA23DF20137F9A39:r "CLICK HERE TO FIGHT BACK AGAINST THE FAKE NEWS")
---
| Thank you for standing with me,
---
| [ ](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57136553:6aIwEZuyN:m:1:3206719985:FCE76B9AE35F7693DA23DF20137F9A39:r)

body:
We need commonsense immigration policies brought back to Washington. That's what I and so many of my colleagues in Congress are fighting to do.

[](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001n2Rxk-ThMCYgdaeFzKWenaln3GEK_hc5291kWHl5nprRTgR7oGsa0t405GcjPUZbBK4zm5lW4mOhBPj0jlDHR67vgTDxwJAEe7Px_wgpkeq9S7h_0Q8WjC1_oH04kr_CMPBPcVzpvJCi_2K-JQYPR_IqTwUJmFhPhVk7cyftJHH11RyJRhvuYU2o7djjBP27kbK5sAl9YzpzRPQEcjqDiHSpK5cA-e6LRWxcLXsylyNFTPRmaNg1ROdt_pjygJmwLiA99Xydqu4jPIhLKJW2-KPyzF6tzJPGFEawHtLi2s0kIIKIOGmHBjaeg5ic7nwQ3pC-u96dQkDEcRCpWEsUMhdwswvMtKRTAChcNs9xRD6Sz-E1IY1i3XSGsqBIVDmCa2VJcWVm0jPU30qMRUPQ-ipIo_SaHI_dRRSU6jULMVXZKyJoVQGtfmAzdyW2GyJCTWVdXjzHXtBPJcXr2KDKoRAqDHi3IBQb3RF805-gZQM9yEQvmmMf7fSu_ogLrdxeHMfv32mDY9o=&c=xIzZJpAlvqQfhXCYrhqIZBI7Z-676GGSJ3GYpiv9nj2zwwkBFnElhA==&ch=0EZkfDUJV1pzmowfJJ1l230iMIfuneCAwtuN7oF1h5aTqHKhlmpHDw==)

[](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001n2Rxk-ThMCYgdaeFzKWenaln3GEK_hc5291kWHl5nprRTgR7oGsa0t405GcjPUZbBK4zm5lW4mOhBPj0jlDHR67vgTDxwJAEe7Px_wgpkeq9S7h_0Q8WjC1_oH04kr_CMPBPcVzpvJCi_2K-JQYPR_IqTwUJmFhPhVk7cyftJHH11RyJRhvuYU2o7djjBP27kbK5sAl9YzpzRPQEcjqDiHSpK5cA-e6LRWxcLXsylyNFTPRmaNg1ROdt_pjygJmwLiA99Xydqu4jPIhLKJW2-KPyzF6tzJPGFEawHtLi2s0kIIKIOGmHBjaeg5ic7nwQ3pC-u96dQkDEcRCpWEsUMhdwswvMtKRTAChcNs9xRD6Sz-E1IY1i3XSGsqBIVDmCa2VJcWVm0jPU30qMRUPQ-ipIo_SaHI_dRRSU6jULMVXZKyJoVQGtfmAzdyW2GyJCTWVdXjzHXtBPJcXr2KDKoRAqDHi3IBQb3RF805-gZQM9yEQvmmMf7fSu_ogLrdxeHMfv32mDY9o=&c=xIzZJpAlvqQfhXCYrhqIZBI7Z-676GGSJ3GYpiv9nj2zwwkBFnElhA==&ch=0EZkfDUJV1pzmowfJJ1l230iMIfuneCAwtuN7oF1h5aTqHKhlmpHDw==)
\-- Fox News Friend, The crisis at our country's southern border continues to worsen every single day. **Sadly, the Biden Administration is FAILING to address it.** We need common sense immigration policies in Washington. I am working alongside my colleagues in Congress to ensure that these policies prevail; but, with our voice in the minority, it can be _extremely_ difficult. **This is one of the many reasons why winning back the House Majority is my number one priority! But I simply can 't do that without sufficient resources. This is where I need your help the most.** I'm humbly asking you, Friend, to chip in a contribution of $10, $20, $50, or whatever amount you can to help me in my mission to restore conservative values, protect our great nation, and win back the House for Republicans. ---

Friend,

It's a complete outrage that governor **Cuomo was more concerned about getting a BOOK DEAL** than creating a coronavirus plan to help New Yorkers survive the pandemic.

This WASN'T 2 years after the crisis...no, this was right in the middle of a global pandemic that hit New York the hardest. **And now, the economy is STILL hurting, small businesses are STILL struggling, and our kids are STILL out of school.** | [**HOLD CORRUPT CUOMO ACCOUNTABLE**](http://links.nicolemalliotakis.com/u/click?_t=759a85d1cba743719e64e2569e23c9b8&_m=57398758aaf748429a1fec7239c13b44&_e=wkTi91rNY3tFlTqd9Kr9D7zu6v3FSENEONkm-GqaafqBvIICdpNbvXHyWNZ4TjHf9koMg5M9PUjC3MvegK3w52vQufi4k6FvzcDXSvhbim5GqnP5qwvOTu4wpl0xgR9iUWRx1NO89JR7qnIG8KTdxcNVCeVpKedFtUdU6GmJeSrcyDYeqANHa4bYC8lzERG81mQOYbMy1FrmPC0KdVYquWXCAxwRHNKgvNBVf5r6WKtRA6TtrXFyHD4iwoHDNCf4m_iG_tn2DQRJOAqvcd_-f2lRq5W6CGXDUcVWvs7IRKzapywZdgRSYkGzMjPimMSDFysFMnDa9VPJdSy2t0yafnmjs_N91bszipFdVsOUZAU2AHvk7UFc26HbpJo0CUUr-sWQq20ts3R2NjE6Qz9brk2n9UtpB-kLRa8u-vOayMxMcTF6QKiLvqhaJpE44eYsSopYi7ocYSrRRYzP6z4vbw4wc2ryzF7YDc4Hn7oTJfanEJHhgmdVna7RHg280L4mr5hyiXsCECDxiv93yajoiA%3D%3D)
---
When this pandemic first started, we had the U.S. Navy Comfort ship on standby and the Javits Center ready for COVID patients. **And yet Governor Cuomo still put people back into the nursing homes leading to thousands more needless deaths.

Here is what they should do: **
1. **Take Cuomo’s Emmy Back**
2. **Take his book off the shelves**
3. **And prosecute Cuomo for a COVER-UP!**

[**HOLD COVER-UP CUOMO ACCOUNTABLE**](http://links.nicolemalliotakis.com/u/click?_t=759a85d1cba743719e64e2569e23c9b8&_m=57398758aaf748429a1fec7239c13b44&_e=wkTi91rNY3tFlTqd9Kr9D7zu6v3FSENEONkm-GqaafqBvIICdpNbvXHyWNZ4TjHf9koMg5M9PUjC3MvegK3w52vQufi4k6FvzcDXSvhbim5GqnP5qwvOTu4wpl0xgR9iUWRx1NO89JR7qnIG8KTdxcNVCeVpKedFtUdU6GmJeSrcyDYeqANHa4bYC8lzERG81mQOYbMy1FrmPC0KdVYquWXCAxwRHNKgvNBVf5r6WKtRA6TtrXFyHD4iwoHDNCf4m_iG_tn2DQRJOAqvcd_-f2lRq5W6CGXDUcVWvs7IRKxyPIf5f2nJCp_Lyiy-Y6hzw7eqcUOXPcQTE6OgLhMaGauIj9VQETYwuYAGUCcf3qzMf9CGYD0Q7L8-FxBlF9YeS2IhBiz14uMpITPko0DbnMJI3XRJQcJlH16gb-TVi-s1fR5Z5Ln73B-4y0OY1daekCE1kYhKc1OgctuOPL8Vi-2VacszWbLu_zPcFSFXF7rNGJbKvZoOx0w1r-H2h5fA6d0a6I8ju6y3fqviIb4yEg%3D%3D)
---
Unfortunately, Cuomo has the backing of **DEM DARK MONEY PACs** and the wealthy liberal elite behind him. **The only way I can hold him accountable is by getting help from small donors like[YOU.](http://links.nicolemalliotakis.com/u/click?_t=759a85d1cba743719e64e2569e23c9b8&_m=57398758aaf748429a1fec7239c13b44&_e=wkTi91rNY3tFlTqd9Kr9D7zu6v3FSENEONkm-GqaafqBvIICdpNbvXHyWNZ4TjHf9koMg5M9PUjC3MvegK3w52vQufi4k6FvzcDXSvhbim5GqnP5qwvOTu4wpl0xgR9iUWRx1NO89JR7qnIG8KTdxcNVCeVpKedFtUdU6GmJeSrcyDYeqANHa4bYC8lzERG81mQOYbMy1FrmPC0KdVYquWXCAxwRHNKgvNBVf5r6WKtRA6TtrXFyHD4iwoHDNCf4m_iG_tn2DQRJOAqvcd_-f2lRq5W6CGXDUcVWvs7IRKwANkhYBKpY-8oqPQLBhG7gE1yeiHwSGCbk1c_QXF200uc_eUVJtHLVn_FyFBzN1fHj4m4Eyd2Ym_GG4lRal-WbzZgerg0R-F1QvKYmCd_YS8QZjPbD6ERWrmRuRXgAC_Q9dXJP0PofCbJik34DlmOz1kXh2AkeF1yibisWi26MfTmQnpcO4VH4gppDf1kZzkpCr-g8QLwyiER_dvZhIAev5Pd-6Qo7iHuL7qTttK2Z6w%3D%3D)**
[**HOLD CON-MAN CUOMO ACCOUNTABLE**](http://links.nicolemalliotakis.com/u/click?_t=759a85d1cba743719e64e2569e23c9b8&_m=57398758aaf748429a1fec7239c13b44&_e=wkTi91rNY3tFlTqd9Kr9D7zu6v3FSENEONkm-GqaafqBvIICdpNbvXHyWNZ4TjHf9koMg5M9PUjC3MvegK3w52vQufi4k6FvzcDXSvhbim5GqnP5qwvOTu4wpl0xgR9iUWRx1NO89JR7qnIG8KTdxcNVCeVpKedFtUdU6GmJeSrcyDYeqANHa4bYC8lzERG81mQOYbMy1FrmPC0KdVYquWXCAxwRHNKgvNBVf5r6WKtRA6TtrXFyHD4iwoHDNCf4m_iG_tn2DQRJOAqvcd_-f2lRq5W6CGXDUcVWvs7IRKzmcz4zOjQltfl-9izTaf7aJsE_ev4qJifdsuIgKTTiN5k6HeS2MHXPNgABHG_bydCN-Eo0yF63aVmbgr8mLrq_QOGnyBae8lWqIqQDOutWOALntFmNPX2GggGm6y-vv5mhlonCrDaAABWoZ2xmWaT2_hYS-NiHDRq-vXFzMYCZZ6fBxC4MzjajESzdZGbwpC6AAj54CXM7yQonXsSJCdPC_h0XEMguc2Ja-lPKq5hLeQ%3D%3D)

body:
Stand up to AOC and the Democrats

****
Rep. Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez said anyone who uses the term "surge" when talking about the crisis at the border supports "white supremacist" philosophy.

This is just the latest example of AOC ignoring facts.**** Surge by definition means an unusually high number. **There IS a surge at the border.** If AOC visited the border, she would see what's happening under Biden's watch.

We can't ignore this situation. Lives are at risk. Even Biden's Homeland Security Secretary admits that we should resume construction on the border wall to plug some "gaps."

Together we've made a lot of progress -- but there's still more to go. Here's what Rachel Maddow had to say...

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/27437907/280093721/-1001649105?refcode=210325_bugs&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83Mjc4NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkYmM4NDZmMi02Njk5LWViMTEtODVhYS0wMDUwZjIzN2FiZWYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=FLjOT5RAIQjUgN96MHW3HDbNORL9w1mbBhj2RG5c-XA=) Dear Derek,

name: Josh Hawley
subject: Has Biden Forgotten His Fast And Furious Scandal?!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Josh Hawley for Senate
body:
Biden knows a thing or two about firearms trafficking — remember the Fast and Furious scandal?! [](http://email.hawleyformo.com/u/click?_t=11a592fdc01846d4a1c728421295853d&_m=a29268bb446c471fae80fefbea955d39&_e=xKrA_pUTF9gUgCqIDbMNdh8p4wqSBmQGcI_yY9V3WG93N60mNZw507CunboMQTmbHWZ52Ov6oL7SfmPB_lBJzOCwyIEjfi6vIi6s5MfBGuS1Hn7Mjf4RuMxx9ViUZ-n8BaavM10ay8bjbTOtD27XbgUo5Pqhs-4x7B9XRxm0zj4nMOia9ZxXTHyNT4oWBXzJ-58rsILy9ziTNOrbzplHJ0TKYjC68bamen_13jR7STZrVuK0764j9YwIx17H2jg0cvBLdjYxx0Svmu3JQPCzAVLxTnz_aSwKTPH_oJV8m3gP16j2fY1ohOliPiqIRswJZK5pJujXs84iZBxSWn-D3biUcsud3JTfdfXf8IhyzLHyFJAAYKfArh47WM0HIbeGvuy-kigHi8zQEPOIHR6YLw%3D%3D) | |
---
Peter,
Yesterday Joe Biden announced his scheme to undermine the rights of gun owners and water down the 2nd Amendment.

Biden's plan calls for a new report on firearms trafficking that “will better help policymakers address firearms trafficking as it is today, not what it was yesterday.”

Biden knows a thing or two about firearms trafficking — under the infamous Fast and Furious gun-trafficking operation undertaken during his time as VP, hundreds of assault rifles were handed to cartels, criminals, and other deadly, nefarious actors.

**I wonder if Biden’s gun-trafficking report will mention the U.S. Border Patrol officer who was murdered with one of the Obama/Biden Administration’s trafficked guns.**

Despite approving of deadly gun-trafficking operations south of the border (which he has failed to secure), Biden wants to turn law-abiding citizens into criminals by taking these executive actions.

It’s pretty simple — we should be making it harder for criminals to get guns and easier for law-abiding citizens to keep them.

Even CNN, who has great trouble with the truth, accurately reported my views on gun control last week.
I believe in the critical nature of the 2nd Amendment, but Joe Biden doesn’t, saying as much, “no amendment to the Constitution is absolute.”

**Biden’s wrong — the 2nd Amendment is crystal clear, “the right of the people to keep and bear Arms, shall not be infringed.”**

I will fight with everything in me to keep the Biden Administration from infringing on YOUR right to bear arms.
[_**FIGHT BACK AGAINST BIDENS HYPOCRISY**_](http://email.hawleyformo.com/u/click?_t=11a592fdc01846d4a1c728421295853d&_m=a29268bb446c471fae80fefbea955d39&_e=xKrA_pUTF9gUgCqIDbMNdh8p4wqSBmQGcI_yY9V3WG93N60mNZw507CunboMQTmbEpi1aL83BDifM4qpMpZpyv7mUssReADSx2tsIiVsId2N_kBTsjYGOKkc0m-2oHbvdO2Wieib3njVfAL3UObkgPvH50WSDDsMel8v7tKceE1J7-hs2dF9pX7S_FMUHXpdof8X633FrGG5yI9zuDoASeIU7sr2nrgr7Ipj0omn18By-1N-RIKMvgxZeQvuK98WhApJHHDqWwk_C6naaYvGXUdJziRQHI1i9_7j7Sobhg8KbCPXK-kznr8o3PyO8HYxL8Lh2k9bRnBimJKazNQf9X5bnk0SN0rIfVHT7wcxB_JvUinzZqbl2mqWi45Yd19BGrtjTrGBI0y6AThaBIHclPnCA1ppcgvh8I-PP3Gk5DI%3D)

Thank you,
Josh Hawley

P.S. If you want to join our team and be part of this movement, sign-up and donate to our campaign. Every dollar helps us fight the big-tech, big-corporation, elitist establishment who are hell-bent on keeping the status quo.
[_**DONATE**_](http://email.hawleyformo.com/u/click?_t=11a592fdc01846d4a1c728421295853d&_m=a29268bb446c471fae80fefbea955d39&_e=xKrA_pUTF9gUgCqIDbMNdh8p4wqSBmQGcI_yY9V3WG93N60mNZw507CunboMQTmbEpi1aL83BDifM4qpMpZpyv7mUssReADSx2tsIiVsId2N_kBTsjYGOKkc0m-2oHbvdO2Wieib3njVfAL3UObkgPvH50WSDDsMel8v7tKceE1J7-hs2dF9pX7S_FMUHXpdof8X633FrGG5yI9zuDoASYyIOIA68Ra1ZscKrUZxOSvVQq032UUTysWCZXu7TnL8Vll7W720BnoYtOPZnG6_mRQtJwcfpNgq5hjkoNZE0_XXB1KcIaXlsoMiuafp1c_tjHMIxepZ7gWd0vonAaUMY54__1rmnTa8ttRHjouGCtlLqshZjwUeJw-_aPFhcFBDjEMXeyYiSa2iHaOm-0XE6bjY0GBKm76guoXRuMOCWXc%3D)

Even CNN, who has great trouble with the truth, accurately reported my views on gun control last week. I believe in the critical nature of the 2nd Amendment, but Joe Biden doesn’t, saying as much, “no amendment to the Constitution is absolute.” Biden’s wrong — the 2nd Amendment is crystal clear, “the right of the people to keep and bear Arms, shall not be infringed.” I will fight with everything in me to keep the Biden Administration from infringing on YOUR right to bear arms. Thank you, Josh Hawley P.S. If you want to join our team and be part of this movement, sign-up and donate to our campaign. Every dollar helps us fight the big-tech, big-corporation, elitist establishment who are hell-bent on keeping the status quo. | | | | | ---|---|---|--- Paid for by Josh Hawley for Senate

name: Giffords.org
subject: There's a big problem, and an easy solution.
body:
#

Friends,
**Here 's the problem:** Last month was the second highest month on record for firearms sales in American history. It was also a month engulfed by tragic mass shootings, where we lost precious lives that could have been saved by responsible legislation.
**Here 's the solution:** We need the Senate to act by passing universal background checks legislation into law. We are waiting on a vote any day now and we need to act quickly to make sure Senators know Americans want background checks passed now.
Last month, the House passed a bill that would require a background check before someone purchases a firearm. These background checks are an easy and effective way to keep guns out of the hands of dangerous people.
We can't let the Senate waste any more time. Every day that passes without background checks is another day where more lives are at stake. So before you close this email, we have to ask:
**[Will you make a donation to help us push the Senate to pass universal background checks? With guns being sold in record numbers, we can't afford to waste another day.](https://action.giffords.org/page/m/385ee141/78fba3aa/633e5523/50aadabf/3415750170/VEsH/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMTA0MDktMS1mdWxsIn0%3D/?g=VoprG3y8bT5gPy-pvV0V7pA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/giffords-em-apr21?refcode=em210409-1-full")**
If you've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:

March was a terrible reminder that gun violence can still reach our communities, even during this pandemic. But we have the power to stop this violence -- and that's why your support is so important today.
Thank you for standing with us in the fight to pass universal background checks.
All our best,
Team Giffords
**[DONATE NOW](https://action.giffords.org/page/m/385ee141/78fba3aa/633e5523/50aadabf/3415750170/VEsEBQ/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMTA0MDktMS1mdWxsIn0%3D/?g=VoprG3y8bT5gPy-pvV0V7pA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/giffords-em-apr21?refcode=em210409-1-full")**

We try to send only the most important information and opportunities to participate via email, but click [here](https://action.giffords.org/page/m/385ee141/78fba3aa/633e5523/50aadab7/3415750170/VEsEBA/?g=VoprG3y8bT5gPy-pvV0V7pA "http://action.americansforresponsiblesolutions.org/page/unsubscribe") if you'd like to unsubscribe. Giffords PAC was started to support elected officials who step up to fight the gun violence epidemic. Thank you for standing with Gabby and Mark.
clean_body: Friends, Here 's the problem: Last month was the second highest month on record for firearms sales in American history. It was also a month engulfed by tragic mass shootings, where we lost precious lives that could have been saved by responsible legislation. Here 's the solution: We need the Senate to act by passing universal background checks legislation into law. We are waiting on a vote any day now and we need to act quickly to make sure Senators know Americans want background checks passed now. Last month, the House passed a bill that would require a background check before someone purchases a firearm. These background checks are an easy and effective way to keep guns out of the hands of dangerous people. We can't let the Senate waste any more time. Every day that passes without background checks is another day where more lives are at stake. So before you close this email, we have to ask: "" If you've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly: | "" | "" ---|--- "" | "" ---|--- "" | "" ---|--- March was a terrible reminder that gun violence can still reach our communities, even during this pandemic. But we have the power to stop this violence -- and that's why your support is so important today. Thank you for standing with us in the fight to pass universal background checks. All our best, Team Giffords "" *

name: Rick Scott
subject: I’m meeting with Trump TONIGHT! Tell me what you want him to know!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRSC
body:
If you stand with President Trump, now is the time to show your support.

Democrats have built a campaign war chest filled with MILLIONS going into this next election cycle. We need to make sure our Conservative candidates have the resources to fight back and win! If we miss this goal, we risk being outraised and outspent AGAIN.
Friend,

I wanted to make sure I got your input before I sat down for a meeting with President Trump.

I'm meeting with him this Friday and wanted to make sure you had a chance to give me your input. What do you think I should prioritize in my chat with him?

subject: We didn’t build it, they came. Should Congress build the wall?

body:
Don't ignore this email friend! We need YOUR help to let leaders in Congress know your thoughts.

With all that is going on at the Southern Border right now, we wanted to know your thoughts on this critical issue:

Construction on the wall was STOPPED, which means everything Conservatives worked to achieve was halted, and since Biden's inauguration, hundreds of thousands of people have tried to enter onto America's Southern border.

**We need YOUR help to let leaders in Congress know your thoughts.**

name: Kevin Faulconer
subject: The EDD has failed Californians
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Faulconer for Governor 2022
body:
Gavin Newsom has failed to respond to California’s unemployment crisis.
Peter, It’s harder to find a bigger mess in California than the Employment Development Department, and that’s saying something. Gavin Newsom was well aware of the EDD’s shortcomings for years, but he still issued a statewide business lockdown that has sent the EDD and millions of Californians into a complete tailspin. [**SUPPORT EDD REFORM NOW >>**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/b8d0d2556ccf170a3a89ac0c84d83476/34943/a88b463d22f86220/c0674a58e0f3e6e8c3d6b838967d376c/34943) _It was announced in December that fraudulent cases could total as much as $2 BILLION dollars. Tens of millions alone have reportedly gone to prison inmates, or to people out of the state._ Meanwhile, legitimate claimants have been denied payments for months! Even California firefighters, who put their lives on the line during the dangerous fire season in our state, were denied payments to make ends meet. **The EDD is failing miserably, and instead of addressing the issues and getting to work fixing it, Gavin Newsom is continuing to fail Californians by silencing and covering up the problem.** I recently held a press conference in Bakersfield to share my plan to reform and overhaul California’s Employment Development Department. I’m proud to have taken on corruption and extreme dysfunction in San Diego, and as mayor I brought commonsense solutions that worked. _Now I’m ready to do it for the whole state, and get California back on track as #1 in the nation to work, live, and play._ **Here are my top three priorities for reforming the EDD:**
* Pausing any new programs for EDD until it fixes its unemployment system.
* Making EDD the state’s top tech project.
* Eliminating any and all roadblocks to reform.

**[If you’re ready to fix the EDD and help Californians who are in desperate need of relief, please chip in now to my campaign.>>](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/b8d0d2556ccf170a3a89ac0c84d83476/34943/a88b463d22f86220/2e79f28fba600207c3d6b838967d376c/34943)** We’re getting closer to a recall election every day, and I need your help to get the word out that we CAN fix this. Don’t miss the chance to be a part of the California Comeback, and fix what’s broken in the Golden State. Thanks for your help,
Kevin Faulconer [**CHIP IN $5 NOW >>**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/b8d0d2556ccf170a3a89ac0c84d83476/34943/a88b463d22f86220/6e90606b36f9db5ac3d6b838967d376c/34943) [**CHIP IN $25 NOW >>**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/b8d0d2556ccf170a3a89ac0c84d83476/34943/a88b463d22f86220/4ca7f57c09e6d665c3d6b838967d376c/34943) [**CHIP IN $50 NOW >>**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/b8d0d2556ccf170a3a89ac0c84d83476/34943/a88b463d22f86220/42de6aecbfbee51ec3d6b838967d376c/34943) [**CHIP IN $100 NOW >>**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/b8d0d2556ccf170a3a89ac0c84d83476/34943/a88b463d22f86220/7efd73a3c3697756c3d6b838967d376c/34943) [**CHIP IN $250 NOW >>**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/b8d0d2556ccf170a3a89ac0c84d83476/34943/a88b463d22f86220/c263b631b80e9a70c3d6b838967d376c/34943) [**CHIP IN $500 NOW >>**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/b8d0d2556ccf170a3a89ac0c84d83476/34943/a88b463d22f86220/ea71d88a00c856d7c3d6b838967d376c/34943) | | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/b8d0d2556ccf170a3a89ac0c84d83476/34943/a88b463d22f86220/212701429b77f9b6c3d6b838967d376c/34943) | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/b8d0d2556ccf170a3a89ac0c84d83476/34943/a88b463d22f86220/674719b6170824a5c3d6b838967d376c/34943) | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/b8d0d2556ccf170a3a89ac0c84d83476/34943/a88b463d22f86220/be377258a341cffdc3d6b838967d376c/34943)

Friend, this is Governor Rick Perry.
There has never been a more critical time in our nation's history.
We need leaders in Congress who will stand up to Nancy Pelosi, Joe Biden, and their far-left agenda.
**That 's why I'm supporting my friend, Jake Ellzey, for Congress in the MUST WIN Texas special election. **
Jake's a retired Navy fighter pilot, a successful businessman, and a STRONG Conservative who will NEVER give up on you.
[**Can I count on you to contribute $5, $10, or $25 TODAY and help Jake Ellzey win this critically important seat?**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001YUw8HkDpYIrDxxE7nCcB7wXc1ja7wCbq-IPhshxewtkWQmFH_hl9qmreGEXipDPhIY114CvRX1qzer7W_q0u_m7mOZg-DBh4q2OS88SA-Fc8Ei5FuTsXrT1uUinY9gNnTRMz0qTtMHnNd5szieLaFusDUQwUv4FYJhd17LUsIgaLo2yUE05KeR228TjfxPSnsJXnKUs_utTSc4zzaT1SQfhvBPL6DwY_b7f2hPxOz1nCFSlo0E9Lq9OMhsn3tDM0e_iPna1ZDmEzi5gy-5Ujd6lAOPShCrOZTTnidqDWvdaBx4MofPQUQnJ-X6sbLz0y8Ck2jsqtVe3_S0x5moQnzMlR_UCumx3TX8y6mAHMUFuEV0NtMzrwPdyy7jgrpktUdFA8MA3QyFmczhYiR2p8KAyTh0ZJabKhieyqcIgmmml6weasTIzynSoAg1KL_FS8fg9zinxwP2elp8Npzk6MMeFNffHu_-4rulUggcSFZyA=&c=6jCiB3vhJg28cUIvR-2lVu5hbzzLWWNxasj09US1prtXZATLXeqXjA==&ch=pEFHikbU8FamgAdNRZqe0DmwMVY0ByEJeo2v9HHSD2ZQV-nzWmuVFA==)

Republicans in Congress are the only ones who will stand up for the middle-class -- and that's why it's SO important that we stop far-left Democrats from BUYING this Congressional seat.
We don't have much time left, Friend. If we want to RETIRE Nancy Pelosi, we can't afford for you to sit this one out.

If Joe Biden succeeds in expanding--and destroying--the Supreme Court, there will be no accountability in Washington, no checks and balances as our Founding Fathers intended. **Joe Biden, Nancy Pelosi, Chuck Schumer, and far-left Democrats will have free, unabated reign of the United States --and we simply cannot allow that.**

**We CANNOT let them get away with this.**

****[SAVE THE SUPREME COURT](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001fAsz3n5OTHwFnXzQOEfux0KzDboV5JJWaiub_IM246HlVCR1QfvxfI7HGDbL0r8pTxQRi021l2-nXZBFISiYBdnVeAJg-3i7VdEWtwUfomg0pEKJ92YzduH-osJEM8l8UMynNlZZ2jfYUDf-xagY8rxDmG6earAbg1ZYN-DNgRZuUz1xG-j0pCDHAEu0Q0zIsrnyG-zHeLFFy9K-Xajf1yWZQipphCCYDMvHeegy0ZiuWjJRsKhSUNKk5lIlJCExQgqTwWIG80jDUnDclrwxhdAQD7qbTCI1F0erQp1rrjS82erEPaODXo6qxJ9zdUHSNt-jfI52660XHK766giQGaEfGfFrkwaJ7LM3RpcOJWw0-t6ddA4wCURGK9ujgPzZt6OHsChwlpuxbAs7GN21-Hvw0QILm_R7a93sFDK8QhCOcQvytMEVRgLshb7JUT88_GeJlpEcannPMiyUqCeFTQ==&c=Fq48pw0p4xh2Q4mIvi_KBzuExBeyP9iohbcXaJrOk_fycZbg3bs83A==&ch=rCqsJo819vsXjklWKXZGYX5JVAKPmBV02JvJ0VZ92gNiPIJX5bbvdg==)****

subject: 🚨MLB goes woke, 60 Minutes and CBS show their bias
body: a new Gov for NY? and more... View this email in your browser (https://mailchi.mp/80018b9a6d37/seanspicer49?e=f6564bbe3b) Logo ** CBS praises Biden White House for “new tradition” of Skype seats in the press room... ------------------------------------------------------------ Evidently, CBS reporters don’t have access to Google, because had Kathryn Watson looked into this “new tradition” before tweeting it she would have discovered this is NOT a new tradition. (https://www.washingtonpost.com/news/the-fix/wp/2017/02/01/skype-seats-are-a-mixed-blessing-in-their-debut-at-white-house-media-briefings/?mc_cid=1b0a53b124&mc_eid=UNIQID) I proudly opened the White House briefing room to reporters outside the beltway back in 2017. Of course back then many in the press didn’t like that reporters outside of the room were (https://www.usatoday.com/story/news/politics/2017/07/05/sean-spicer-turns-skype-seats-white-house-press-briefing-questions/431673001/?mc_cid=1b0a53b124&mc_eid=UNIQID) being called on to ask questions. I’m all for the Biden White House continuing this idea, reporters outside of the beltway are more likely to ask policy questions that are important to Americans, but the difference in the coverage of them doing it compared to when I did is just further evidence of the bias in the mainstream press. ** 60 Minutes shows its bias... ------------------------------------------------------------ Another long week of divisive and biased media coverage started on Sunday night’s episode of 60 Minutes. 60 Minutes set out to smear republican Governor Ron DeSantis’ vaccine rollout in Florida. 60 Minutes not only selectively edited an exchange with Governor DeSantis, but also ignored evidence that didn’t fit their narrative from the democrat Mayor of Palm Beach Dave Kerner who put out a statement directly refuting their divisive claims (https://dim.mcusercontent.com/cs/d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd/images/c01e6b1e-763c-439e-9b66-bd32c29599eb.jpeg?w=538&dpr=2&mc_cid=1b0a53b124&mc_eid=UNIQID) . Here is the edited exchange between reporter Sharyn Alfonsi and Governor DeSantis that 60 Minutes put out to preview the segment: https://twitter.com/60Minutes/status/1378850175951761409?s=20&mc_cid=1b0a53b124&mc_eid=UNIQID Shelby Talcott (https://twitter.com/ShelbyTalcott?s=20&mc_cid=1b0a53b124&mc_eid=UNIQID) of the Daily Caller, actually put out the full answer that Governor DeSantis gave here (https://dailycaller.com/2021/04/05/60-minutes-hit-job-ron-desantis-publix-vaccine-distribution/?mc_cid=1b0a53b124&mc_eid=UNIQID) . 60 Minutes has continued to put out statements defending this segment and as Steve Krauker (https://twitter.com/SteveKrak?s=20&mc_cid=1b0a53b124&mc_eid=UNIQID) put it in the Fourth Watch (https://t.co/9wqDhvG590?amp=1&mc_cid=1b0a53b124&mc_eid=UNIQID) , proven that they still don’t get it (https://mailchi.mp/thefirsttv/fourth-watch-apr-8-21?mc_cid=1b0a53b124&mc_eid=UNIQID) . ** Good Reporting on Bad Reporting: ’60 Minutes’ Flamed Over ‘Hit Job’ Against Gov. DeSantis, Publix On Vaccine Distribution (https://dailycaller.com/2021/04/05/60-minutes-hit-job-ron-desantis-publix-vaccine-distribution/?mc_cid=1b0a53b124&mc_eid=UNIQID) via Shelby Talcott (https://twitter.com/ShelbyTalcott?s=20&mc_cid=1b0a53b124&mc_eid=UNIQID) at the The Daily Caller ------------------------------------------------------------ http://twitter.com/share?url=https%3A%2F%2Fmailchi.mp%2F80018b9a6d37%2Fseanspicer49&text=%F0%9F%9A%A8MLB+goes+woke%2C+60+Minutes+and+CBS+show+their+bias+via+%40seanspicer&count=none ** Rep. Lee Zeldin announces run for governor of New York to challenge Governor Andrew Cuomo ------------------------------------------------------------ https://twitter.com/newsmax/status/1380290608607150081?s=20&mc_cid=1b0a53b124&mc_eid=UNIQID My friend Rep. Lee Zeldin has announced that he’s running for governor of New York because of Governor Andrew Cuomo’s failed leadership. #ICYMI Rep Zeldin joined us Thursday night on Spicer & Co to tell us about his decision, here (https://twitter.com/newsmax/status/1380290608607150081?s=20&mc_cid=1b0a53b124&mc_eid=UNIQID) . More on the Zeldin campaign (https://j.mp/3mt6ck3?mc_cid=1b0a53b124&mc_eid=UNIQID) http://twitter.com/share?url=https%3A%2F%2Fmailchi.mp%2F80018b9a6d37%2Fseanspicer49&text=%F0%9F%9A%A8MLB+goes+woke%2C+60+Minutes+and+CBS+show+their+bias+via+%40seanspicer&count=none ** Baseball and politics don’t mix... ------------------------------------------------------------ Next up in a long list of absurd things that happened this week, MLB decided to move the All Star game out of Georgia because of recently passed election laws. Let’s rewind a little to be clear on what’s in the “controversial” election legislation, because themainstream media is not reporting on it fairly- check out this great mashup (https://twitter.com/i/status/1376674442391195657?mc_cid=1b0a53b124&mc_eid=UNIQID) from @newsbusters (https://twitter.com/newsbusters?mc_cid=1b0a53b124&mc_eid=UNIQID) . Here is a breakdown of what’s in the new election law (https://twitter.com/newsmax/status/1376674442391195657?s=20&mc_cid=1b0a53b124&mc_eid=UNIQID) in Georgia from Spicer & Co last week. https://twitter.com/newsmax/status/1376674442391195657?s=20&mc_cid=1b0a53b124&mc_eid=UNIQID My favorite part of this whole story is that they decided to move the game to Colorado, a state where wait for it, they also require photo ID to vote (https://twitter.com/seanspicer/status/1379261338137022465?s=20&mc_cid=1b0a53b124&mc_eid=UNIQID) , not to mention only allow for 15 days of early voting vs. Georgia’s 17. So MLB doesn’t really care about voting laws of states where games are played (as they shouldn’t), but instead are faking it for the sake of the mainstream media and woke left. ** Good Reporting on Bad Decision Making: “Good luck with your fans, Major League Baseball” (https://www.washingtonpost.com/opinions/2021/04/04/good-luck-with-your-fans-major-league-baseball/?mc_cid=1b0a53b124&mc_eid=UNIQID) via Hugh Hewitt (https://twitter.com/hughhewitt?s=20&mc_cid=1b0a53b124&mc_eid=UNIQID) in The Washington Post ------------------------------------------------------------ Last week over 5,000 people voted on a poll question I tweeted about carrying a “Vaccine Passport”, and I was surprised at how close the results were (https://twitter.com/seanspicer/status/1378422587689201665?s=20&mc_cid=1b0a53b124&mc_eid=UNIQID) . Have another question for you- https://twitter.com/seanspicer/status/1380601562070929423?s=20&mc_cid=1b0a53b124&mc_eid=UNIQID ** This week in Florida ------------------------------------------------------------ I took some time off to spend this week in Florida with my family for Easter, but Wednesday night I went to dinner at Mar-a-Lago. We sat at the table next to President Trump, who was generous enough to send over some of his favorite items on the menu, lobsters and ice cream. Lyndsay and I told the story last night on Spicer & Co, watch it here (https://twitter.com/i/status/1380309483088273408?mc_cid=1b0a53b124&mc_eid=UNIQID) . I was also able to catch up with some old friends, Dan Scavino, Michael Caputo and Marcia Lee Kelly. More on my instagram: @seanmspicer (https://www.instagram.com/seanmspicer/?mc_cid=1b0a53b124&mc_eid=UNIQID) ** Follow along on social media: ------------------------------------------------------------ https://www.facebook.com/seanmspicer?mc_cid=1b0a53b124&mc_eid=UNIQID https://www.instagram.com/seanmspicer/?mc_cid=1b0a53b124&mc_eid=UNIQID https://twitter.com/seanspicer?mc_cid=1b0a53b124&mc_eid=UNIQID https://seanspicer.com?mc_cid=1b0a53b124&mc_eid=UNIQID mailto:contact@seanspicer.com Copyright (C) 2021 RigWil LLC. All rights reserved. You are receiving this email because you opted in via our website. RigWil LLC 2308 Mount Vernon Ave Ste 415 Alexandria, VA 22301-1328 USA Update Preferences (https://seanspicer.us18.list-manage.com/profile?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=e2c241b9e7&e=f6564bbe3b&c=1b0a53b124) | Unsubscribe (https://seanspicer.us18.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=e2c241b9e7&e=f6564bbe3b&c=1b0a53b124) Email Marketing Powered by Mailchimp http://www.mailchimp.com/email-referral/?utm_source=freemium_newsletter&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=referral_marketing&aid=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&afl=1

name: staff@maggiehassan.com
subject: this doesn't track
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH
body:
Hi, we'll keep this quick:
The race to keep New Hampshire blue and retain Democrats' Senate majority is heating up far sooner than we anticipated. Recent polls show Senator Hassan down and Republicans are spending big on attack ads designed to smear Maggie's record.
Our fundraising absolutely MUST pick up or else we won't be able to defend this vulnerable seat and the GOP will take back the Senate majority.
The Senator emailed you about the $25,000 we need to raise before midnight, but our records indicate you haven't given toward this Rapid Response goal yet. [**You 're a top supporter, so this doesn't track for us. If you're able, can you please pitch in $3 or more right now to keep New Hampshire blue?**](https://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fc890/2a380d31/26a2fb3e/f076f5/1954571550/VEsH/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiaGFzc2FuX2dlbmVyYWwiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6ImUyMDIxMDQwOV90cmFja19uYSIsImUzc2dURkJCUVZGMVpYSjVVM1J5YVc1bklIMTkiOiIzLDI1LDUwLDEwMCwyNTAifQ%3D%3D/?g=YHsLejpTVzRXNXNZdVQ0tHA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/hassan_general?refcode=e20210409_track_na&amounts=3,25,50,100,250")
Thanks so much, we really appreciate the help. We know we say it all the time but since Maggie only won by 1,017 votes in 2016, we're completely serious when we say that your donation could be the thing that wins -- or loses -- this race. Thank you!
Have a good weekend,
Team Maggie
P.S. -- If you've given recently, thank you so much. We've received your donation, it's just still processing!

name: AOC Organizing Team
subject: Can you chip in $3 to expand our Homework Helpers tutoring program?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
body:
We’re on track to reach our goal of connecting 1,000 students to tutors by the end of June.
# [](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/143?refcode=em20210409-2001-header&t=1&akid=2001%2E2526796%2EvR58Pg)
Alexandria launched the Homework Helpers tutoring program in New York City after the largest public school system in the nation closed down late last year due to COVID-19. Now, thousands of students are still remote learning.
The program was quickly embraced by communities across New York’s 14th district, and it’s grown into a network of dedicated volunteer tutors who saw that Homework Helpers was changing lives, and they wanted to be part of it.
We never expected to get 13,000 volunteers signed up in the first few days, let alone have 1,000 actively tutoring today. So, now we’re excited to be in the position to expand the program to include virtual extracurricular activities!
**In order to keep up with the demand for programming, and fund the expansion into extracurricular activities, we need support from our grassroots donors today.**
[Will you make a $3 contribution right now to help us grow our Homework Helpers tutoring program?](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/8518?refcode=em20210409-2001&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=20&akid=2001%2E2526796%2EvR58Pg)
**[Contribute $3](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/8518?refcode=em20210409-2001&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&akid=2001%2E2526796%2EvR58Pg)**
We did our first extracurricular programming last week — bringing our students a virtual cooking class. And, we plan to expand virtual activities to include courses in early literacy, readers theater, and computer coding.
We’ve heard from so many parents about how much our Homework Helpers program has helped ease the anxiety of balancing working full-time at home and childcare.
**The Homework Helpers program is on track to reach our goal of connecting 1,000 students to the program by the end of June. But to reach that goal, we need your help now.**
[Will you help us ensure we have the tools and resources to expand our Homework Helpers program and meet this goal by making a contribution today?](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/8518?refcode=em20210409-2001&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=22&akid=2001%2E2526796%2EvR58Pg)
Homework Helpers is the epitome of what our politics _should_ be about: helping people.
Thank you for your support and for being an important member of our movement.
Team AOC

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ocasio-campaign?refcode=em20210409-2001-footer&t=23&refcode2=2001_2526796_vR58Pg&akid=2001%2E2526796%2EvR58Pg)**
---

Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you. But, if you'd like to receive fewer emails, [you can do so here](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/). If you'd like to update your contact information, **[click here](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/signup/did-your-information-change/?t=27&akid=2001%2E2526796%2EvR58Pg)**. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, [click here to unsubscribe](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=28&akid=2001%2E2526796%2EvR58Pg). To contribute via check, please address to Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, PO Box 680080, Corona, NY 11368.
Email us: us@ocasiocortez.com

Note from Chairman Stepanek
Derek,

**First, ****I would like to thank everyone who took the time to join us outside of Senator Maggie Hassan's office this past Tuesday, in defense of our First in the Nation Primary. Opportunities like this are an important channel for Granite Staters to make their voices heard - We are ****grateful for our volunteers and the time they spent representing this important cause.**

**I continue to urge everyone to reach out to our Senators regarding the S.1 bill (H.R.1) and the imminent danger it poses for Granite Staters. This bill will take away our ‘First in the Nation’ primary status, and we must share our deep opposition to this campaign. Our 'FITN' status is more than just a political tradition, and has remained an intricate part ****of our state's history for over a century. More so, our New Hampshire primary isn't a single party issue, but rather an opportunity for granite staters of every political background to come together in support of our political heritage. **

**While Democrat officials in DC are attempting to mask this bill as a positive move for voter expansion, they’re chipping away at the base of our Granite State’s election system. Our****[petition](http://email.nhgop.org/ls/click?upn=uaUlc6wqPXNLu3PjY1l0S3BDZN-2BK-2F8MQRaPpb5edq5vzl6xzfzVd6LBXC-2FJGkqjqXmue7AR3L4jvp8cXZznW0lJpXucMOFTRnsZ-2FsJJWXaY-3D9i6F_XwU9lPq5-2Bze3gI64ohlV0cQwWAuBAU7ADIvj2CS7ymjAsE1Zi6tzOlV7-2FvSOebYnavHKJvVnCb2rII3gg1FDdlopGtDrZsL9eoyZhDy-2FFPje-2BYrILSNtJbl9oIShQAOOPnkXEMnPX4w9gc4xjw8VMBL3OKvtcz-2BUWwufpdVFw1d6vkdDU3beDV22KIEVG95HF-2BG-2BL6QX94fzojq-2F2-2B27F9tkThDxspUietZ22vdEmc224edWMIkCPxfPdd4mIRo4-2Fs7RvQmTMyILeFzppEitqdRBGVAPs8USkT3rKE55NrrcIiSj9CafiwzJcXq5rhfK7MCfMyobLQyiW-2BHiH9SLVjHLqXKB9cp40jSMangoOTIoAuc4AxDpWWvvK5ZukwguSAo6hFY6ER1RiQFyxmWqeenbg7LF-2BbeEI-2F-2BQv5-2FMwZftn9kh9vcFctYZ-2FNJTclYLu-2FFmJhq9-2FUmaHtaTVOoYQg-3D-3D) to defend our First-in-the-Nation Primary is still active, ****and I ask that you sign and share this petition with your networks. We need our Federal delegates to know how deeply we oppose this bill, and that we refuse to allow D.C legislators to take control over New Hampshire’s governing abilities and traditions. Please be sure to reach out to Senator Shaheen, and Senator Hassan to relay your concerns. **

**Additionally, this is the final weekend before the Merrimack Special Election, and we are inviting everyone to lend a hand in ensuring Bill Boyd's successful election! Tomorrow (April 10th), consider joining us at the Merrimack Transfer Station at 8:15am for a sign wave (Coffee and donuts will be provided on a limited first come first serve basis)! At 10am, we will wrap up our sign wave and knock doors on Bill's behalf throughout the afternoon. For further questions, reach out to maya@nhgop.org - We hope to see you there!
**

**As a reminder, please encourage folks to subscribe to our newsletter, and if there’s anything you would like us to highlight, please reach out to info@nhgop.org!**

**Sincerely,**
**Stephen Stepanek**
**NHGOP Chairman**

Senate Update from Senate President Morse
**Senate Report Card- Straight As!**

This week, the New Hampshire Senate focused on education, passing a series of bills that would help improve our schools and give parents and students more tools to seek out the best education possible.

American Civics - HB 320 would require New Hampshire students to pass the civics naturalization examination developed by the 2020 United States Citizen and Immigration Services. We should ensure that anyone earning a high school diploma is an informed and prepared citizen. This test covers basic American history and government, such as the name of the first President, the role of three branches of government, and the protections included in the Bill of Rights.

Adequacy Standards - HB 242 amends the content of an adequate education, providing basic minimum standards for biology, physical science, earth science, civics and government, economics, geography, history, and personal finance literacy. We need to ensure that our students receive the core academic knowledge to prepare them to thrive in adulthood.

Academic Innovation - HB 609 would create Innovation Schools, giving local school officials the option to seek waivers from state requirements in order to create new ways to educate our students. By unleashing the power of innovation, we can give local school boards and administrators the flexibility to create methods of instruction, new courses, and whole new ways to reach students who are struggling under our calcified educational bureaucracy.

Assessment - HB 194 would enable the state Department of Education to share results from our annual assessment exams with parents whose school districts are reluctant to share this data in a timely manner. Parents need to know how their children are doing in order to make decisions about their educational futures. HB 194 would help give every parent more information about their children's academic progress.

In addition to the Education Freedom Accounts created under SB 130, these bills represent an education reform agenda that can revitalize New Hampshire schools and empower parents to make the right choices for every New Hampshire student.
